basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position. Candidates holding a first-class B.E./ B.Tech. or M.E./ M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, related branches, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, or allied disciplines from a recognized University/Institute are eligible to apply through email. Candidates with a valid GATE/ NET qualification will be given preference. The application process is open up t

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: First class B.E./ B.Tech. or M.E./ M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and related branches, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, or allied disciplines from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates with GATE/ NET qualification will be preferred.
qualification.details: First class B.E./ B.Tech. or M.E./ M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and related branches, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, or allied disciplines from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates with GATE/ NET qualification will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and experience Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BITS Pilani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First class B.E./ B.Tech. or M.E./ M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and related branches, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, or allied disciplines from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates with GATE/ NET qualification will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on merit and experience Online Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Junior Research Fellow post at BITS Pilani is 15 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications are sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Junior Research Fellow position in the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow posts at BITS Pilani is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month. This is a contractual appointment.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a first-class B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering or related fields. GATE/NET qualification is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow posts at BITS Pilani. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Junior Research Fellow at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position includes shortlisting based on merit and experience, followed by an online interview. Candidates will be notified accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow post is Pilani, Rajasthan. Selected candidates will be working at the Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani campus.

faq.question: Q9. When was the notification released for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 was released on 26 June 2026. Interested candidates should refer to this date for application timelines.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for the official website details. The notification will provide the most accurate and up-to-date information regarding the institute.
